title: juncus acutiflorus var. minor
intro: Juncus acutiflorus var. minor, also known as dwarf green rush, is a type of sedge plant that is native to New Zealand and eastern Australia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The plant has been traditionally used to treat respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as skin conditions like eczema and acne. The leaves and stems of the dwarf green rush can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties and promote health benefits.
